results.title: Is Westside The New Zudio? Bernstein Maps Trent's Expansion Sprint
results.description: Bernstein cuts Trent's target to Rs 3,500 but keeps its Outperform call, arguing Westside's surprise 50-stores-a-year guidance deserves a fresh look after years of Zudio stealing the spotlight.

results.title: MP: Narmada river swells in Dindori as heavy rainfall lashes the region
results.description: Narmada River water level rises in Dindori after heavy rain. Authorities monitor flood risk and advise residents to stay alert during monsoon.
